# FL Medicaid NPI — Sample org report: Aspire Behavioral Health

**Organization:** Aspire Behavioral Health (FL)  
**Report source:** B6 integrated report (`b6_integrated_report_fl`)  
**Generated by:** `scripts/sample_org_report_fl.py`

---

This is a **mockup** of the report produced when the B6 view and landing data exist in BigQuery. To generate a live report:

1. Load landing data (PML, PPL, TML, DOGE) and run dbt:
   ```bash
   cd mobius-dbt
   export BQ_PROJECT=mobius-os-dev
   export BQ_LANDING_MEDICAID_DATASET=landing_medicaid_npi_dev
   export BQ_MARTS_MEDICAID_DATASET=mobius_medicaid_npi_dev
   uv run dbt run --select +b6_integrated_report_fl
   ```
2. Run the sample org script:
   ```bash
   uv run python scripts/sample_org_report_fl.py "Aspire Behavioral Health" -o reports/aspire_behavioral_health_sample_report.md
   ```

---
